name: Magneto
description: Erik Magnus Lehnsherr, a Holocaust survivor, emerged from humanity's greatest atrocity with the conviction that mutants must never allow themselves to be subjugated. His ability to manipulate electromagnetic fields at a planetary scale makes him one of the most powerful mutants alive, capable of reshaping metal, generating force fields, and even manipulating the iron in human blood. As founder of the Brotherhood of Mutants, Magneto serves as a dark mirror to Xavier's dream.
